RegisterIdempotentState.description: State model derived from RegisterIdempotent TLA+ spec

IdempotentAllocation.message:
IdempotentAllocation violation: phase = "done" =>
    (\A c \in InputCriteria : bindings[c] = bindings_at_save[c])
IdempotentAllocation.description: Verifier for invariant IdempotentAllocation from RegisterIdempotent spec

NoDuplicateNodes.description: Verifier for invariant NoDuplicateNodes from RegisterIdempotent spec

conditions:
\A c \in DOMAIN bindings_at_save :
    (c \in DOMAIN bindings) => (bindings[c] = bindings_at_save[c]
BindingStable.message:
BindingStable violation: \A c \in DOMAIN bindings_at_save :
    (c \in DOMAIN bindings) => (bindings[c] = bindings_at_save[c])
BindingStable.description: Verifier for invariant BindingStable from RegisterIdempotent spec

SecondCallSkipsAllocate.description: Verifier for invariant SecondCallSkipsAllocate from RegisterIdempotent spec

BoundedExecution.description: Verifier for invariant BoundedExecution from RegisterIdempotent spec

assert_IdempotentAllocation.condition:
phase = "done" implies
    (\A c in InputCriteria : bindings[c] = bindings_at_save[c])
assert_IdempotentAllocation.message:
Assertion failed: IdempotentAllocation — phase = "done" =>
    (\A c \in InputCriteria : bindings[c] = bindings_at_save[c])
assert_IdempotentAllocation.description: Test assertion for IdempotentAllocation from RegisterIdempotent spec

assert_NoDuplicateNodes.message: Assertion failed: NoDuplicateNodes — Cardinality(dag_nodes) = Cardinality(DOMAIN bindings)
assert_NoDuplicateNodes.description: Test assertion for NoDuplicateNodes from RegisterIdempotent spec

assert_BindingStable.condition:
\A c in DOMAIN bindings_at_save :
    (c in DOMAIN bindings) implies (bindings[c] = bindings_at_save[c])
assert_BindingStable.message:
Assertion failed: BindingStable — \A c \in DOMAIN bindings_at_save :
    (c \in DOMAIN bindings) => (bindings[c] = bindings_at_save[c])
assert_BindingStable.description: Test assertion for BindingStable from RegisterIdempotent spec

assert_SecondCallSkipsAllocate.message: Assertion failed: SecondCallSkipsAllocate — phase = "done" => call_count = call_count_at_save
assert_SecondCallSkipsAllocate.description: Test assertion for SecondCallSkipsAllocate from RegisterIdempotent spec

assert_BoundedExecution.description: Test assertion for BoundedExecution from RegisterIdempotent spec
